name: electronics
description: Circuit simulator with schematic editor, DC/AC/transient analysis, Newton-Raphson nonlinear solver, 15 component types, Monte Carlo/parameter/temperature sweep, SPICE export, circuit templates, educational calculators, and MCU co-simulation
author: Makestack

userdb_tables.name: electronics_circuits
userdb_tables.description: Circuit metadata (name, description, canvas size, sim settings)

userdb_tables.name: electronics_components
userdb_tables.description: Placed component instances within a circuit

userdb_tables.name: electronics_nets
userdb_tables.description: Named electrical nodes (nets) within a circuit

userdb_tables.name: electronics_pins
userdb_tables.description: Pin-to-net connections forming the circuit topology

userdb_tables.name: electronics_sim_component_results
userdb_tables.description: Per-component current/power/voltage results with operating region

userdb_tables.name: electronics_wire_segments
userdb_tables.description: Geometric wire segments for schematic display

userdb_tables.name: electronics_junctions
userdb_tables.description: Junction points where 3+ wire segments meet

userdb_tables.name: electronics_sweep_points
userdb_tables.description: Multi-point simulation data for AC/DC sweep/transient waveforms

userdb_tables.name: electronics_subcircuits
userdb_tables.description: Reusable subcircuit definitions with port pins

userdb_tables.name: electronics_subcircuit_instances
userdb_tables.description: Subcircuit instances placed within a circuit

userdb_tables.name: electronics_mcu_programs
userdb_tables.description: Python tick function programs for MCU co-simulation

api_endpoints.name: list_circuits
api_endpoints.description: List all circuits with pagination

api_endpoints.name: create_circuit
api_endpoints.description: Create a new empty circuit

api_endpoints.name: get_circuit
api_endpoints.description: Full circuit with components, nets, wires, pins, and latest simulation result

api_endpoints.name: update_circuit
api_endpoints.description: Update circuit name, description, or canvas size

api_endpoints.name: delete_circuit
api_endpoints.description: Delete circuit and all children

api_endpoints.name: add_component
api_endpoints.description: Place a component (auto-assigns ref designator, creates pins, parses engineering values)

api_endpoints.name: update_component
api_endpoints.description: Move, rotate, or change value of a placed component

api_endpoints.name: delete_component
api_endpoints.description: Remove a component and its pins from the circuit

api_endpoints.name: create_net
api_endpoints.description: Create a named net (electrical node)

api_endpoints.name: connect_pins
api_endpoints.description: Connect a component pin to a net (auto-creates net if needed)

api_endpoints.name: disconnect_pin
api_endpoints.description: Remove a pin's net connection

api_endpoints.name: list_wires
api_endpoints.description: List all wire segments and junctions for a circuit

api_endpoints.name: create_wire
api_endpoints.description: Create a wire segment on a net

api_endpoints.name: delete_wire
api_endpoints.description: Delete a wire segment

api_endpoints.name: split_wire
api_endpoints.description: Split a wire at a point creating a junction and two segments

api_endpoints.name: auto_route
api_endpoints.description: Generate Manhattan-routed wire segments between two points

api_endpoints.name: run_drc
api_endpoints.description: Run design rule checks returning warnings

api_endpoints.name: list_regions
api_endpoints.description: List annotation regions for a circuit

api_endpoints.name: create_region
api_endpoints.description: Create a named annotation region

api_endpoints.name: update_region
api_endpoints.description: Update region name, color, or description

api_endpoints.name: delete_region
api_endpoints.description: Delete a region and its members

api_endpoints.name: add_region_member
api_endpoints.description: Add a component or net to a region

api_endpoints.name: remove_region_member
api_endpoints.description: Remove a member from a region

api_endpoints.name: run_simulation
api_endpoints.description: Run simulation (op, ac, dc_sweep, transient, monte_carlo, param_sweep, temp_sweep)

api_endpoints.name: get_results
api_endpoints.description: Get the latest simulation results for a circuit

api_endpoints.name: get_result_detail
api_endpoints.description: Get a specific simulation result with full breakdown

api_endpoints.name: list_library
api_endpoints.description: List available built-in component types (15 types)

api_endpoints.name: get_component_type
api_endpoints.description: Get full detail for a component type

api_endpoints.name: get_model_presets
api_endpoints.description: Get model presets for a component type (1N4148, 2N3904, etc.)

api_endpoints.name: create_subcircuit
api_endpoints.description: Create a reusable subcircuit definition

api_endpoints.name: list_subcircuits
api_endpoints.description: List all subcircuit definitions

api_endpoints.name: get_subcircuit
api_endpoints.description: Get subcircuit with internal netlist

api_endpoints.name: delete_subcircuit
api_endpoints.description: Delete a subcircuit definition

api_endpoints.name: add_subcircuit_instance
api_endpoints.description: Place a subcircuit instance in a circuit

api_endpoints.name: list_subcircuit_instances
api_endpoints.description: List subcircuit instances in a circuit

api_endpoints.name: delete_subcircuit_instance
api_endpoints.description: Remove a subcircuit instance

api_endpoints.name: export_spice
api_endpoints.description: Export circuit as SPICE netlist (.cir format)

api_endpoints.name: export_bom
api_endpoints.description: Export bill of materials (JSON/CSV)

api_endpoints.name: export_bundle
api_endpoints.description: Export full circuit as JSON bundle

api_endpoints.name: export_waveform_csv
api_endpoints.description: Export waveform data as CSV

api_endpoints.name: list_templates
api_endpoints.description: List available circuit templates (12 templates)

api_endpoints.name: create_from_template
api_endpoints.description: Create circuit from a template

api_endpoints.name: calc_voltage_divider
api_endpoints.description: Calculate voltage divider output

api_endpoints.name: calc_led_resistor
api_endpoints.description: Calculate LED current-limiting resistor

api_endpoints.name: calc_rc_filter
api_endpoints.description: Calculate RC filter cutoff frequency

api_endpoints.name: calc_bjt_bias
api_endpoints.description: Calculate BJT bias resistor values

api_endpoints.name: explain_mna
api_endpoints.description: Step-by-step MNA matrix construction explanation

api_endpoints.name: upload_mcu_program
api_endpoints.description: Upload Python tick function for MCU component

api_endpoints.name: get_mcu_program
api_endpoints.description: Get current MCU program

api_endpoints.name: delete_mcu_program
api_endpoints.description: Delete MCU program

api_endpoints.name: seed_catalogue
api_endpoints.description: Seed built-in component presets to the catalogue

api_endpoints.name: list_catalogue_models
api_endpoints.description: List electronics component models from the catalogue

api_endpoints.name: create_catalogue_model
api_endpoints.description: Create a new component model from SPICE parameters (datasheet ingestion)
